metadata.source: Table 2, Paper1_Manuscript.docx (Operationalising the Gates: Risk-Tiered Thresholds section)
metadata.description: Risk-tiered minimum evidence thresholds by governance domain
metadata.note: Extracted from manuscript paragraph text. The structure of the gates remains constant; the height of the minimum floor varies by risk class.

domains.higher_risk_floor: Intersectional analysis; documented mitigation plan; parity monitoring.

domains.standard_risk_floor: Model card with data provenance and exclusion criteria.
domains.higher_risk_floor: Full technical file; version-controlled traceability log.
Board sign-off; AI Clinical Lead with protected time.

domains.standard_risk_floor: Monthly performance audits with documented review; or contracted shared-service equivalent.
domains.higher_risk_floor: Real-time drift detection; automated alert thresholds; independent audit.
